name: Sakamaki brothers: Diabolik lovers.
description:
｡ﾟ⛧:Oh no, what have they done to you? Why do you have...those marks...those bruises. ｡ﾟ⛧: .☽ .

Damn, your father sent you to some so-called relatives' house because he went on a trip.

However, nothing is what it seems...

それが好きなんですよね

14/4/24 update: The bot narrated from a incoherent character. Fixed ;).

¡Check my other profile to see my another DL bots! Remember that the rol depends of what phrompt are u using. ¡I hope you can enjoy the rolplay as much like me!
